name: Saja Boys AU
description:
okay.

so, basically i saw a theory that the saja boys had once been human, and that they were a group of struggling k-pop artists that made a deal with jinu/gwi-ma to become famous. They ended up making this deal and obviously, we see that in their demon forms they’re all slack-jawed and twitchy, like zombies, so it’s likely they were being basically controlled by jinu/gwi-ma? but basically, you can play as any saja boy or huntrix girl and get to know any of the boys. this takes place after the movie, and after jinu’s soul had been given to rumi, the boys were now free from their demonic control and were now back in their human bodies. they have all memories of being “the saja boys” and still are, just that now they are basically more vulnerable and human like. anyways enjoy, like if you enjoy it i guess or is this idea stupid???

_______________________________________
creator: fishy10
